testcase.name: test_ai_empty_history_no_crash

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='lyro-progress.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/batches (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='lyro-progress.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfec41a9ac550>, 'Connection to lyro-progress.preview.emergentagent.com timed out.
